## Checklist

- [ ] Build succeeds (`make zip`)
- [ ] No unprefixed globals introduced (`kiriof_` / `KIRIOF_`)
- [ ] Inputs sanitized, outputs escaped
- [ ] Nonce verification on all form/AJAX handlers
- [ ] Text domain is `kiriminaja-official` for all translatable strings
- [ ] No new CDN or external resource dependencies added
